style_effects: Gentle, iridescent fairy dust particles drift lazily upward in soft, pastel-colored trails, refracting light into delicate rainbow hues. A warm, pearlescent glow emanates from Voltrorb's body, casting a gentle, pearlescent aura with petal-shaped particles swirling in slow, graceful circles. The lighting mood is a serene, soft pink and lavender luminescence, with faint musical note vibrations shimmering in the air like delicate chimes. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
